title: Is there an app or integration with monday that allows you to see your website traffic/ analytics?
excerpt: Hello, so far I really like the customizability of monday but curious if I can view my website analytics within the platform as well. Thank you

posts.author: joeparini (Joseph Parini)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, so far I really like the customizability of monday but curious if I can view my website analytics within the platform as well. Thank you

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @joeparini! Are you using Google Analytics?
There is a Zapier integration with Google Analytics that would look similar to:

image901×625 41.1 KB

There are other Monday “actions” that can occur, for example, you can update an existing item with the data from your Google Analytics or create an update on an item.

Let me know if you have any questions here or at greg@elevateops.io!

posts.author: joeparini (Joseph Parini)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome, thank you! I will look into it

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, you can use the Data Importer app for this.

We’ve got a Google Analytics specific tutorial too.

Screenshot 2024-09-14 at 14.54.091936×1268 223 KB

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Connect your Google Analytics to Looker Data Studio and then you can add LDS dashboards to your monday dashboards by using monday’s own Embedded Data Studio app:

monday.com

Embedded Data Studio - monday.com Marketplace

Display your Data Studio reports side by side with your monday boards or dashboards
